notes: In-Feed Video Ads appear on YouTube (search results, homepage, watch next). The source page indicates no maximum video length for in-feed format. Creative options include a long headline and description (specific character limits not stated). The video must be uploaded to YouTube. Companion banners (computer only) are supported. Available under campaign subtypes: Video Views, Drive Conversions, and Video Reach (Efficient Reach). Bid strategy is tCPV or tCPM depending on subtype.
